# KoiKeeper (koikeeper.ai)

> Premium water quality & care for koi ponds.

Continuous water-quality monitoring, AI disease diagnosis and seasonal care calendars for serious koi keepers.

## What this is
KoiKeeper is a vertical in the CSOAI Hive — EU AI Act / NIS2 / DORA compliant tooling exposed as Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers callable by any AI agent.

## MCP tools
- meok-koikeeper-ai-mcp.water_quality: Pull live water-quality telemetry into dashboards or automations.

## Discovery
- Agent card: https://koikeeper.ai/agent.json
- MCP catalog: https://koikeeper.ai/.well-known/mcp.json
- Sitemap: https://koikeeper.ai/sitemap.xml
- Hive registry: https://csoai.org (271 published MCP servers)

## Pricing
See https://koikeeper.ai/pricing/
